name: Yankee Fiddlehead Pie (or Quiche)
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Parsley, chopped or 2 cups Chopped Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with the milk until blended.
2. Fold in the chopped fiddleheads, leeks, parsley, and half of the grated cheese. Season with salt to taste.
3. Pour into the partially baked pie shell and sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
4. Decorate the edge with whole cooked fiddleheads.
5. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 minutes, or until set. Turn off the heat and let rest 10 minutes before serving.
